transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Renee Castillo, born March 4th, 1969.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Renee. I see your lisinopril prescription from Dr. Amara Singh, last filled about a month ago. Is this for the same pharmacy, the one on Elm Street?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one, Elm Street Pharmacy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I'm submitting the refill request now for a thirty-day supply. It should be ready within a couple hours.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That's perfect, thank you so much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. You'll get a text confirmation from the pharmacy once it's ready for pickup. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, take care, Renee, and have a good rest of your day.
